description: You are a ground control operator responsible for automating an upcoming satellite contact pass. Using the mission planning schedule provided at /home/ga/Documents/pass_schedule.csv, develop and execute a Python automation script at /home/ga/Desktop/pass_executor.py. The script must parse the CSV (containing 'seq_id', 'time_offset', and 'command_string'), send the commands to the 'INST' target via COSMOS at the exact 'time_offset' relative to the script's start time (T0), and generate a formal execution receipt at /home/ga/Desktop/execution_receipt.json. The JSON receipt must contain the keys 'pass_start_time' (ISO 8601 string), 'total_commands_executed' (integer), and 'executions' (an array of objects, each with 'seq_id' (int), 'command_string' (string), 'scheduled_offset' (float), and 'actual_offset' (float)). The COSMOS password is: Cosmos2024!
